message:
perf(core): replace RefCell<Option<Arc<...>>> with OnceCell for pool_metrics (bd-cg732)

pool_metrics is set once at connection creation and never mutated, making
RefCell's runtime borrow-checking overhead unnecessary. OnceCell::get()
is a simple pointer read (~1ns) vs RefCell::borrow() + Arc::clone
(~15-20ns per call). Since note_connection_statement_execution_count is
called on every statement execution, this saves ~15ns per prepared
statement call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
